title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.1350 - Voting by board, votes necessary to pass a motion
text:
86.1350.  Voting by board, votes necessary to pass a motion. — Each member of the retirement board shall be entitled to one vote in the decisions of the board.  Five votes or more in favor shall be necessary to pass a motion by the retirement board at any meeting of the board.
(L. 2005 H.B. 323)
